seed_instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 16 sentences.
instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. The response must contain at least 16 sentences.
response:
Paris offers many wonderful experiences for travelers who want to save money.
You should start your morning by walking through the beautiful Tuileries Garden.
Visit the Louvre Museum early to see famous masterpieces without paying extra fees.
The Eiffel Tower provides a stunning view of the city from the ground.
You can enjoy a delicious baguette from a local bakery for lunch.
Many charming cafes serve affordable espresso and pastries near the Seine River.
Take the Metro to reach different neighborhoods like Montmartre and the Marais.
A weekly Navigo pass is a very cost-effective way to travel around.
Walking along the river is a free way to see historic architecture.
Picnic in the Luxembourg Gardens with some cheese and fresh fruit.
Explore the hidden streets of the Latin Quarter for unique local vibes.
Visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica to see the city from a high hill.
Street food stalls offer tasty crepes for a very low price.
Stay in a hostel to keep your accommodation costs quite low.
Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of the city during your weekend stay.
Paris is truly a magical destination for every budget-conscious traveler.<turn|>
